microsoftSourceClaims.claimText: Microsoft Learn documents access reviews for users and groups in Microsoft Entra ID Governance and explains review definitions, instances, and decision workflows.
Microsoft Graph v1.0 documents access review definition and decision endpoints that this scaffold references for source verification and sample script outputs.
Microsoft Learn notes that application and service principal access review coverage is still preview-scoped, so this contract remains limited to human and group review patterns.

licenses: Microsoft Entra ID Governance or Microsoft Entra Suite for production access review workflows
roles: Identity Governance Administrator or User Administrator for review creation and monitoring
SharePoint Administrator for owner and site association checks
features: Access review wizard visibility in Microsoft Entra admin center
Upstream solution 02 oversharing findings available for risk-prioritized review creation
capacityRequirements: One documentation-first execution host with PowerShell and representative artifact storage
dataRequirements: Representative sample data only; no production identities or membership exports
prerequisites.notes: If licensing or wizard visibility is missing, expected disposition is BLOCKED with source citation and prerequisite attestation artifacts.

steps.intent: Verify solution 02 oversharing output path is present and identify whether status is not-found, empty, or validated before deployment.
steps.expected: Dependency status is recorded truthfully without fabricating readiness.
steps.operatorNote: Record deployment manifest dependency status before any review lifecycle command.

readBack.expectation: Dependency status reflects actual upstream artifact availability.

steps.intent: Confirm the Access Reviews wizard is visible in Microsoft Entra admin center for authorized operators.
steps.expected: Wizard visibility is confirmed or explicitly marked as a blocked prerequisite.
steps.locator: Microsoft Entra admin center > Identity Governance > Access reviews

readBack.reference: Access Reviews blade screenshot or operator note
readBack.expectation: Visibility result is captured for PASS or BLOCKED disposition.

phases.title: Run sample review creation and results checks

steps.intent: Execute New-AccessReview in documentation-first mode to validate review definition output shape and tier-driven autoApplyDecisions behavior.
steps.expected: Output includes riskTier, siteUrl, and calendar-cadence metadata without requiring tenant mutations.

readBack.expectation: Definitions contain reviewFrequencyMonths, riskTier, siteUrl, and autoApplyDecisionsEnabled.

steps.intent: Execute Get-ReviewResults in sample mode to verify escalation threshold handling and stable decision field shape.
steps.expected: Result summary reflects tier escalation threshold and outputs decisions with riskTier and siteUrl.

readBack.expectation: Escalation threshold is 24 in regulated tier and decisions include siteUrl plus riskTier.

phases.title: Verify Microsoft source references without POST operations

steps.intent: Verify source reference for access review definitions endpoint using Microsoft Graph documentation.
steps.expected: Documentation endpoint remains available and aligns with definition workflow claims.

readBack.expectation: Reference confirms definition and decision resources remain documented.

steps.intent: Verify applyDecisions source references only and confirm no POST calls are executed during this contract run.
steps.expected: applyDecisions is documented as a referenced operation while runtime remains read-only in this lab contract.
steps.operatorNote: Do not execute POST /applyDecisions in this contract; capture documentation reference and no-mutation attestation instead.

readBack.expectation: Attestation explicitly states source-verification only for applyDecisions.

steps.intent: Record that this contract run executed read-only verification and sample outputs only.
steps.expected: Cleanup note confirms no mutable tenant operations were performed.
steps.operatorNote: No mutation steps were executed; remove lab output files if local cleanup is required.

readBack.expectation: Attestation confirms read-only execution and zero tenant mutations.

requiredArtifacts.description: PowerShell transcript covering sample review creation and result collection commands.
Captured Learn and Graph references for definitions, decisions, and applyDecisions source verification.
Blocked prerequisite note when licensing, role assignment, or wizard visibility is unavailable.
